style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Koffing's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, casting sharp blue-white light that casts long, precise shadows. Metallic dust particles drift slowly in the air, catching the light like tiny shards of ice. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
